chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 714 of 2020 CP D 393 of 2020 CP D 394 of 2020 CP D 715 of 2020 CP D 1148 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 3458/2020 2. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Suneel, advocate for the petitioner Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Nadir Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Dr. Naveed Ul Haq Chaudhry advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent in CP D 393 of 2020, whereas, Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent in CP D 714 of 2020. Both vakalatnamas are taken on record. Per learned counsel, show cause notices have been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
